name: NovaCredit Personal Loan Scorecard (fictional)
task: probability that a personal-loan application is approved
note: Fictional weights for teaching only. The feature list below is the COMPLETE set of model inputs. No protected attribute (race, color, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, age, receipt of public assistance) is a model input, and none may ever appear in an explanation.

features.label: Debt-to-income ratio
features.adverse_action_reason: Debt-to-income ratio is too high relative to income

features.label: Revolving credit utilization
features.adverse_action_reason: Proportion of revolving credit in use is too high

features.label: Delinquencies in the last 24 months
features.adverse_action_reason: Number of recent delinquencies on credit obligations

features.label: Credit inquiries in the last 6 months
features.adverse_action_reason: Too many recent requests for credit

features.label: Annual income (thousands)
features.adverse_action_reason: Income is insufficient for the amount requested

features.label: Loan-to-value ratio
features.adverse_action_reason: Loan amount is too high relative to the collateral value
